title: The Secret of the Tomb
description: On pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this part focuses on luffy breaks crocodile’s scheme. The final struggle beneath Alabasta turns against Crocodile as Luffy keeps fighting and Robin forces Cobra toward the hidden history Crocodile wants.
scene: This scene belongs to the Luffy Breaks Crocodile’s Scheme sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Nico Robin, King Cobra, Luffy, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Clear the way, I'm in a hurry.

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Like I care who I'm holding hostage...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: I really do despise you government dogs.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you won't clear the way...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'll just have to kill you!

summary: The final struggle beneath Alabasta turns against Crocodile as Luffy keeps fighting and Robin forces Cobra toward the hidden history Crocodile wants.
